message: Starting Phase 4 code review - reading all files
Phase 4 review FAIL - compilation error in TestSubscriber.cs, plus minor issues in MoveExecutionSystem and HintSystem
Phase 5 review in progress — reading all files, checking architecture, tests, acceptance criteria
Phase 5 review PASS with fixes applied: typo fix, XML doc removal, dispose safety, buffer sharing bug
Starting Phase 6 code review — reading new test files and diffs
Starting Phase 7 review - reading all 16 View files and dependent Core/Systems files
All 16 View files read. Reading Core/Systems complete. Now checking compilation via Unity MCP.
Compilation passes after fixing asmdef (PrimeTween -> PrimeTween.Runtime). 3 deprecation warnings on OverlapPointNonAlloc. Now performing detailed checklist review.
Review complete. Compiling final verdict. Found 2 critical issues (asmdef + GameLifetimeScope overwritten), 1 significant issue (duplicate animation on drag-drop), and several minor issues.
Phase 7 review: PASS with fixes applied. Fixed asmdef PrimeTween reference and restored GameLifetimeScope. Documented non-blocking issues.
